name: Earl "Duke" Austin, Jr.
background: Mr. Austin has served as President and Chief Executive Officer of Quanta since March 2016. He previously served as Chief Operating Officer from 2013 to 2016 and as President of Quanta’s Electric Power Division and Oil and Gas Division from 2011 to 2012. He has been with Quanta since 2001.

commpanies.name: Quanta Services, Inc.
commpanies.title_or_role: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer
